title: ForestVamp
description: The goal of this modpack is to remain lightweight and add a few mods to make adventuring and exploring more fun.
body:
# Forest Vamp

The goal of this modpack is to remain lightweight and add a few mods to make adventuring and exploring more fun. There's a new dimension to explore thanks to deeper and darker, and new gameplay elements plus structures thanks to haema. Along with the normal quality life improvements you'd expect from a modpack ( a minimap and crafting menu).

# Usage

follow this [guide](https://docs.modrinth.com/docs/modpacks/playing_modpacks/) from modrinth for instructions on using modpacks.
